news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea feiert Deb脙聝脗录t auf der UzFood 2026 in Taschkent
news_detail.content_en:
Our team successfully participated in UzFood 2026, showcasing our premium organic tea series and connecting with buyers from Central Asia.

The exhibition, held at Uzexpocentre NEC in Tashkent from April 1-3, attracted over 15,000 visitors from 40+ countries. At booth F92, we displayed our latest organic green tea, black tea, and white tea collections, receiving overwhelmingly positive feedback from distributors and retailers.

Several promising partnership discussions are currently underway, and we look forward to expanding our presence in the Central Asian market. Our team was particularly pleased to introduce our new organic gunpowder tea, which garnered significant attention from buyers seeking high-quality Chinese teas for their retail and foodservice operations.

The Central Asian market represents a significant opportunity for AultrasTea, with growing demand for premium organic teas across the region. We are committed to building long-term partnerships with local distributors who share our vision for sustainable and quality tea products.

Unser Team nahm erfolgreich an der UzFood 2026 teil und pr脙聝脗陇sentierte unsere Premium-Bio-Tee-Serie, wobei wir Kontakte zu Eink脙聝脗陇ufern aus Zentralasien kn脙聝脗录pften.

Die Messe fand vom 1.-3. April statt und zog 脙聝脗录ber 15.000 Besucher aus 脙聝脗录ber 40 L脙聝脗陇ndern an. An unserem Stand F92 pr脙聝脗陇sentierten wir unsere neuesten Bio-Gr脙聝脗录n-, Schwarz- und Wei脙聝脗聼tee-Kollektionen.

Wir freuen uns auf die weitere Expansion in den zentralasiatischen Markt.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea bringt neue Bio-Gr脙聝脗录ntee-Linie auf den Markt
news_detail.content_en:
We are proud to introduce our latest organic green tea collection, featuring Chunmee and Gunpowder varieties certified by EU and USDA organic standards.

This new line represents our commitment to sustainable farming practices and premium quality. The collection includes five distinct grades suitable for both retail and foodservice channels.

All products are available in various packaging options from 50g retail pouches to 5kg bulk containers. The new range includes:
- Premium Chunmee: Smooth, mellow flavor with subtle nutty notes
- Classic Gunpowder: Bold, robust taste with distinctive pearl shape
- Spring Harvest Sencha: Fresh, vegetal character from early spring leaves

Samples are now available for qualified buyers upon request. Contact our export team to arrange for product samples and pricing information.

news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has been awarded ISO 9001:2015 certification, demonstrating our commitment to consistent quality management and customer satisfaction.

This internationally recognized standard validates our quality management system across all operational processes, from tea sourcing and processing to packaging and delivery.

The certification audit was conducted by SGS, one of the world's leading inspection, verification, and testing organizations. Our team successfully completed the comprehensive audit process, which included:
- Review of quality management documentation
- Assessment of production processes and controls
- Evaluation of customer feedback systems
- Verification of continuous improvement practices

This achievement reinforces our position as a reliable partner for global tea distributors seeking consistent quality and supply chain transparency.

AultrasTea wurde mit ISO 9001:2015 zertifiziert und demonstriert damit unser Engagement f脙聝脗录r konsequentes Qualit脙聝脗陇tsmanagement und Kundenzufriedenheit.

news_detail.title_de: Neue Partnerschaft mit europ脙聝脗陇ischen Tee-Distributoren
news_detail.content_en:
We are excited to announce a new distribution partnership with leading tea importers in Germany and the Netherlands, expanding our presence in the European market.

Our new partners bring extensive distribution networks covering retail, foodservice, and e-commerce channels across Western and Eastern Europe.

The initial product range will include our organic green tea and white tea collections, with plans to expand to black tea and oolong varieties by Q3 2026.

This partnership marks a significant milestone in our European market development strategy. We look forward to working closely with our new partners to bring premium Chinese organic teas to consumers across Europe.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea pr脙聝脗陇sentiert sich auf der World Tea Expo 2025
news_detail.content_en:
Our export team attended World Tea Expo 2025 in Las Vegas, meeting with international buyers and introducing our organic tea portfolio to new markets.

Over three days, we conducted over 80 business meetings with potential partners from North America, South America, and the Middle East.

Our booth featured a tasting area where visitors could experience our premium organic teas firsthand. The show generated significant interest in our private label programs and custom blending capabilities.

We look forward to converting these leads into long-term partnerships. Several distributors have already requested samples and pricing information following the show.

news_detail.content_en:
Our new batch of organic white teas including Silver Needle, White Peony, and Yunnan White Peony has completed certification and is ready for global export.

All products in this collection are certified organic by both EU and USDA standards, ensuring compliance with the most stringent international requirements.

Available in various packaging formats including loose leaf, pyramid tea bags, and gift boxes. Minimum order quantities start at 50kg for loose leaf and 10,000 bags for pyramid tea bags.

Contact our export team for pricing and sample requests. We offer competitive pricing for bulk orders and provide comprehensive documentation including organic certificates, origin certificates, and quality reports.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea erweitert Bio-Oolong-Tee-Produktion
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is pleased to announce the expansion of our organic oolong tea production facilities in Fujian Province.

The new production line increases our annual oolong tea capacity by 40%, enabling us to meet growing global demand for premium organic oolong varieties including Da Hong Pao, Tie Guan Yin, and Milk Oolong.

Our investment in state-of-the-art processing equipment ensures consistent quality while maintaining traditional crafting methods that define these prestigious tea varieties.

The expansion includes new solar drying facilities and an eco-friendly packaging line, further reducing our environmental footprint.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea erh脙聝脗陇lt Rainforest Alliance Zertifizierung
news_detail.content_en:
We are proud to announce that AultrasTea has achieved Rainforest Alliance certification for our tea plantations in Guizhou and Hunan provinces.

This certification demonstrates our commitment to environmental sustainability, biodiversity conservation, and responsible farming practices.

Our certified plantations cover over 5,000 hectares and implement sustainable practices including:
- Biodiversity preservation zones
- Water conservation systems
- Integrated pest management
- Fair treatment of farm workers

Customers can now request Rainforest Alliance certified teas as part of their sustainable sourcing initiatives.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea er脙聝脗露ffnet direkte Versandrouten nach Nahost
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has established new direct shipping routes to the Middle East, significantly reducing delivery times and shipping costs for our partners in the region.

New logistics partnerships enable us to offer:
- 30% faster delivery to UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Gulf countries
- Reduced shipping costs
- Improved tracking and customs clearance support
- Consolidated shipping options for smaller orders

This development supports our growing presence in Middle Eastern markets, where demand for premium Chinese teas continues to increase.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea startet Premium-Jasmintee-Kollektion
news_detail.content_en:
We are excited to introduce our new Premium Jasmine Tea Collection, crafted using traditional scenting techniques combined with our organic tea base.

The collection features:
- Jasmine Pearls: Hand-rolled green tea scented with fresh jasmine flowers
- Jasmine Silver Needle: Delicate white tea infused with jasmine aroma
- Jasmine Dragon Pearl: Premium gunpowder tea with intense jasmine notes

Each tea undergoes 7-9 rounds of scenting with fresh jasmine blossoms, creating a beautifully fragrant cup with a smooth, sweet finish.

Samples are now available for wholesale buyers.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea startet nachhaltige Verpackungsinitiative
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is committed to reducing our environmental impact, and today we announce our new sustainable packaging initiative.

Key commitments include:
- 100% recyclable packaging materials by 2027
- Introduction of compostable tea bags for retail lines
- Reduced plastic usage across all product categories
- Carbon offset program for shipping operations

Our new gift box packaging now uses FSC-certified paper and soy-based inks, setting a new standard for sustainable tea packaging in the industry.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea erh脙聝脗陇lt Auszeichnung Bester Tee-Lieferant 2025
news_detail.content_en:
We are honored to receive the 'Best Tea Supplier Award 2025' from the International Tea Committee at the annual Global Tea Summit.

This award recognizes our commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation in the tea industry over the past year.

Key achievements highlighted by the committee:
- Consistent product quality across all tea varieties
- Expansion of organic and sustainable certifications
- Innovation in tea processing and flavor development
- Customer satisfaction and reliable supply chain management

We thank our dedicated team and partners who have contributed to this success.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea unterzeichnet Vietnam-Marktexpansionsabkommen
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has signed a strategic partnership agreement with a leading Vietnamese tea distributor to expand our presence in Southeast Asian markets.

The partnership will initially focus on introducing our organic green teas and herbal teas to Vietnamese consumers through retail chains and specialty tea shops.

Vietnam represents a significant market opportunity with growing demand for premium international tea brands. Our new partner brings extensive local market knowledge and distribution capabilities.

Initial product launch is scheduled for Q3 2025.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea er脙聝脗露ffnet neue Pu-erh-Tee-Verarbeitungsanlage
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is pleased to announce the opening of our new Pu-erh tea processing facility in Yunnan Province.

The state-of-the-art facility combines traditional Pu-erh production methods with modern quality control systems:
- Traditional stone pressing for authentic flavor development
- Climate-controlled aging warehouses
- Advanced moisture monitoring technology
- Full traceability from leaf to cup

The facility can process over 500 tons of Pu-erh tea annually, supporting our growing export business to markets worldwide.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea startet Valentinstag-Tee-Geschenkkollektion
news_detail.content_en:
Celebrate love and connection with our exclusive Valentine's Day Tea Gift Collection, featuring premium teas perfect for sharing.

The collection includes:
- Rose Black Tea: Rich black tea blended with dried rose petals
- Romantic Gift Sets: Curated tea pairs with elegant packaging
- Couples' Tea Sampler: Explore our finest teas together

Each gift set comes beautifully packaged in our signature heart-themed boxes, making them perfect for expressing appreciation to tea-loving partners and friends.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea startet Tee-Sommelier-Ausbildungsprogramm
news_detail.content_en:
We are excited to announce the launch of the AultrasTea Academy, offering professional tea sommelier training programs for our partners and customers.

The comprehensive curriculum covers:
- Tea history and culture
- Tea processing and production
- Quality evaluation and brewing techniques
- Tea and food pairing
- Customer service excellence

Programs are available in multiple languages and can be conducted at our facilities or on-site at partner locations. Graduates receive certification recognized by international tea associations.

Celebrate the holiday season with AultrasTea's specially curated Holiday Tea Collection, featuring festive flavors and beautiful gift packaging.

Highlights include:
- Winter Oolong: Warming spice notes perfect for cold weather
- Holiday Gift Boxes: Premium teas in decorative holiday packaging
- Festive Blend: Special black tea with cinnamon and orange

Orders placed before December 31st qualify for special holiday pricing. Contact our export team to place your holiday orders.

news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea announces record-breaking black tea export volumes for the third consecutive quarter, driven by strong demand from European and Middle Eastern markets.

Key growth drivers:
- New varieties including Golden Snail and Dianhong
- Improved processing techniques enhancing flavor profiles
- Competitive pricing for bulk orders
- Reliable logistics and delivery schedules

We continue to invest in black tea production capacity to meet growing global demand while maintaining our commitment to quality.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea erweitert Teeplantagen um 2000 Hektar
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has completed the expansion of our organic tea plantations in Guizhou Province, adding 2,000 hectares of new planting area.

The expansion supports our growth strategy and commitment to sustainable sourcing:
- New plantings include traditional tea varieties native to Guizhou
- Organic farming practices from day one
- Employment opportunities for local communities
- Increased production capacity for export markets

All new plantations are certified organic and will begin producing harvestable leaves within 3-4 years.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea er脙聝脗露ffnet neues Geschmacksinnovationslabor
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is pleased to announce the opening of our new Flavor Innovation Lab, dedicated to developing unique tea blends and flavor profiles for our global customers.

The lab features:
- State-of-the-art flavor analysis equipment
- Collaboration with international flavor specialists
- Consumer preference research capabilities
- Custom blend development for private label programs

We invite our partners to explore custom flavor development opportunities. Contact us to learn how our innovation team can create signature teas for your brand.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea expandiert mit Kenia-Partnerschaft in ostafrikanischen Markt
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is proud to announce a strategic partnership with the Kenya Tea Development Agency (KTDA), marking our official entry into the East African market.

This partnership will enable us to source authentic Kenyan tea while contributing to local community development through fair trade practices.

Key benefits: Access to premium Kenyan tea varieties, Fair trade certification, Enhanced supply chain resilience, Job creation in rural communities.

The first shipment is expected to arrive in Q3 2026.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea erreicht EU-Organic-Zertifizierung f脙聝脗录r gesamte Produktpalette
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is delighted to announce that our complete product line has received EU Organic certification, meeting the most stringent organic standards in the world.

Certification highlights: 100% organic certified tea gardens, No synthetic pesticides or fertilizers, Traceable supply chain from field to cup, Regular third-party audits and testing.

Our European customers can now confidently offer certified organic teas to their consumers.

news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has deployed a cutting-edge AI-powered tea quality detection system, revolutionizing our quality control processes.

System capabilities: 99.5% accuracy in tea leaf grading, Real-time quality assessment during processing, Early detection of defects and contamination, Consistent evaluation across all batches.

This technology ensures that every cup of AultrasTea meets our exacting quality standards.

news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has inaugurated a state-of-the-art cold chain logistics center in Shanghai, significantly enhancing our export capabilities.

The facility features: 10,000 square meters of temperature-controlled storage, Advanced humidity management systems, Direct connections to major shipping ports, 40% faster delivery to overseas markets.

This investment demonstrates our commitment to delivering the freshest tea products to global customers.

news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is launching a comprehensive sustainable packaging initiative, committing to 100% recyclable packaging by 2027.

Our sustainability commitments: Eliminating single-use plastics from all packaging, Transitioning to biodegradable materials, Implementing circular economy principles, Reducing packaging weight by 30%.

This initiative aligns with our broader mission to minimize environmental impact.

news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea is pleased to announce the launch of our premium Silver Needle white tea collection, sourced exclusively from the finest gardens in Fujian Province.

Collection highlights: Hand-picked during optimal spring harvest, Only the youngest tea buds selected, Traditional sun-withering processing, Limited availability of 500 kg annually.

This exceptional tea offers a delicate, sweet flavor profile with notes of honey and fresh hay.

news_detail.title_de: AultrasTea gewinnt Global Tea Innovation Award 2026
news_detail.content_en:
AultrasTea has been honored with the prestigious Global Tea Innovation Award 2026 for our breakthrough in sustainable tea processing technology.

Innovation highlights: Developed water recycling system reducing consumption by 60%, Implemented renewable energy in processing facilities, Created low-carbon tea processing protocols, Achieved 40% energy efficiency improvement.

This award recognizes our leadership in driving sustainable innovation within the global tea industry.

news_detail.content_de:
AultrasTea wurde mit dem angesehenen Global Tea Innovation Award 2026 ausgezeichnet.

Innovationen: Wasserrrecycling-System reduziert Verbrauch um 60%, 40% Verbesserung der Energieeffizienz.
